title: clinopodium revolutum
intro: Clinopodium revolutum, also known as Revolute Clinopodium, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium revolutum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
